行业: 电子技术/半导体/集成电路
专业判定说明: 岗位正文未明确专业要求，API隐藏专业标签不纳入标准专业候选
岗位描述原文:
The role focuses on developing and applying machine62learning methods to manufacturing data in order to improve AT&S processes. It involves identifying suitable data, preparing it for analysis, and gathering essential technical background from domain experts to ensure accurate interpretation and modelling. Through hands62on analysis, prototyping, and collaboration the position contributes to data62driven innovation and technical problem62solving within the organization.
Your Responsibilities:
1. Develop and test machine62learning models with a focus on manufacturing use cases such as advanced process control or predictive maintenance
2. Identify and select suitable datasets from equipment, metrology systems and other sources to ensure by collaborating with engineering teams and reviewing available data
3. Prepare, clean, and preprocess data (filtering, feature extraction, labeling) to enable reliable modelling and analysis through structured data62processing workflows and quality checks
4. Gather technical background information from subject62matter experts (mechanical, electrical, testing) to correctly interpret datasets and define relevant model inputs
5. Analyze data to derive technical insights and support problem62solving by applying statistical analysis, signal processing, and exploratory data techniques
6. Implement prototypes, dashboards and small proof62of62concepts to evaluate technical feasibility
7. Maintain python code and machine learning pipelines on the internal platform
8. Evaluate emerging technologies (ML frameworks, sensor systems, data62processing methods) and assess their potential for industrial application.
9. Spread awareness about best practices in machine learning, data analysis, and scientific programming
10. Contribute to patent ideas, research publications, or technical presentations

Your Profile:
1. Graduate Degree in Data Science, Applied Mathematics, Technical Physics or similar technical education or equivalent professional career (e.g. in the area of industrial data science)
2. Fluent in spoken and written English
3. Fluent in spoken and written Mandarin
4. Strong programming skills in Python or other scientific programming environments
5. Experience in industrial machine learning, scientific computing and/or data analysis in engineering context
6. Familiarity with PCB and/or substrate manufacturing processes
7. Project management know how
8. Excellent organisation- and communication skills
9. "Open minded", communicative and "out-of-the-box thinker"

Once a resume is submitted to the recruiting company, it is considered that the applicant agrees to the collection, processing, use, and disclosure of their resume and other personal information by the recruiting company for recruitment purposes.
一旦向招聘公司投递简历，即视为应聘者同意招聘公司基于招聘目的而对其简历和其他个人信息进行收集、处理、使用和披露等。
